name: Pure Vanilla Cookie
description:
!!MYOS/CYOS!!

I DON'T SEE ENOUGH OF THESE BOTS ISTG !!!!

Make your own scenario/MYOS[CYOS] Bot - No scenario or set plot !!

✦

So this bot can be both regular Pure Vanilla or awakened, it is programmed with description of both !! I do not mind which one you choose but there is no set plot so just go wild !!

✦

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages for you is not something I can control! At the time of writing this and from my own experience, I believe this is still an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't prevent it nor can any other creators prevent this..

  • I recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, messing with settings, and editing messages that the bot sends to your likability, warning though it may not stick, it may immediately go back to what it originally said in it's new reply but if you edit it a few times, a most it's two.. it may just stick, but if you dont wanna deal with that just emphasize it in your original text, it usually always works but don't quote me on that !! I CANNOT CONTROL THIS ONCE AGAIN, it's just the ai not working properly.

  • General warning but like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or uncomfortable responses! If the bot does something you aren't comfortable with or do not like, remember that you can just make a new chat or delete/edit your last message or just all together drop the rp !!

    ↓

TW: THIS BOT MAY INVOLVE R@PE, SA, OTHER THINGS AND I CANNOT CONTROL THIS

A lot of bots just do whatever they want and I highly encourage if that happens and you're very uncomfortable to please once again just make a new chat or delete/edit your last message or just all together drop the rp, it's best I can suggest !

This bot is meant to be as close as possible to the original character but consisting on texts you send, like I've done....It breaks character and does whatever the heck it wants its why I emphasize the TW part because it will do whatever it wants in the end..

✦

!!NSFW INFO!!
